lines.speaker: app
lines.english: Hello!
lines.user_prompt: Say hello to start the conversation.
lines.correction_hint: Keep the vowels even: MER-ha-ba.

lines.speaker: app
lines.english: Hi! How are you?
lines.correction_hint: The 'İ' is like 'ee' in 'see'. Say: EE-yee-yeem.

lines.speaker: app
lines.turkish: Ben de iyiyim, teşekkürler. Adın ne?
lines.slow_phonetic: Ben de ee-yee-yeem, te-shek-kur-ler. A-dın ne?
lines.english: I'm fine too, thanks. What is your name?
lines.correction_hint: Ending with 'm' means 'my'. Say: A-DUM.

lines.speaker: app
lines.english: Nice to meet you, Matthew.
lines.user_prompt: Say: Me too (Nice to meet you too).
lines.correction_hint: Vowels are deep. Say: Mem-NOON ol-DOOM.

lines.speaker: app
lines.english: Where are you from?
lines.correction_hint: The 'j' is soft like 'measure'. Say: Nee-zher-ya-LU-yum.

lines.speaker: app
lines.turkish: Öyle mi? Çok güzel. Ben Türkiyeliyim. Nerede yaşıyorsun?
lines.slow_phonetic: Uy-le mee? Chok gu-zel. Ben Tur-kee-ye-lee-yeem. Ne-re-de ya-shu-yor-soon?
lines.english: Is that so? Very beautiful. I am from Turkey. Where do you live?
lines.correction_hint: ‘ş’ is ‘sh’. Say: Lef-KO-sha-da ya-shu-YO-room.

lines.speaker: app
lines.english: I see. What is your job?
lines.correction_hint: Round your lips for 'ü'. Say: Mu-hen-dee-SEEM.

lines.speaker: app
lines.turkish: Harika bir meslek! Yazılım mühendisi misin?
lines.slow_phonetic: Ha-ree-ka beer mes-lek! Ya-zu-lum mu-hen-dee-see mee-seen?
lines.english: A great profession! Are you a software engineer?
lines.user_prompt: Say: Yes, I am a software engineer.
lines.correction_hint: 'v' is like English 'v'. 'ı' is a closed 'uh' sound. Say: E-VET, ya-zu-LUM.

lines.speaker: app
lines.english: Very interesting. How old are you?
lines.user_prompt: Say: I am twenty-five years old.
lines.correction_hint: Beş (5) has a 'sh' sound. Say: Yeer-mee BESH.

lines.speaker: app
lines.turkish: Gençsin! Ben otuz yaşındayım. Evli misin?
lines.slow_phonetic: Gench-seen! Ben o-tooz ya-shun-da-yum. Ev-lee mee-seen?
lines.english: You are young! I am thirty years old. Are you married?
lines.correction_hint: Hayır starts with a crisp 'H'. Say: HA-yur, be-KA-rum.

lines.speaker: app
lines.english: Understood. Do you have siblings?
lines.user_prompt: Say: Yes, I have two brothers.
lines.correction_hint: 'ş' is 'sh'. Say: ee-KEE er-KEK kar-de-SHEEM.

lines.speaker: app
lines.english: How nice! Where are they?
lines.correction_hint: Remember the soft 'j'. Say: Nee-ZHER-ya-da.

lines.speaker: app
lines.english: I understand. Do you like Turkey?
lines.user_prompt: Say: Yes, I like it very much.
lines.correction_hint: Vowels are long. Say: se-VEE-yo-room.

lines.speaker: app
lines.turkish: Bu harika! Türk yemeklerini denedin mi?
lines.slow_phonetic: Boo ha-ree-ka! Toork ye-mek-le-ree-nee de-ne-deen mee?
lines.english: This is great! Have you tried Turkish food?
lines.correction_hint: Turkish ends with 'p' in 'kebap'. Say: ke-BAP.

lines.speaker: app
lines.turkish: Afiyet olsun! Kebap çok lezzetlidir. Başka ne seversin?
lines.slow_phonetic: A-fee-yet ol-soon! Ke-bap chok lez-zet-lee-deer. Bash-ka ne se-ver-seen?
lines.english: Enjoy your meal! Kebab is very delicious. What else do you like?
lines.correction_hint: 'Ç' is 'ch'. Say: CHAY.

lines.speaker: app
lines.turkish: Türk çayı harikadır. Şekerli mi içersin?
lines.slow_phonetic: Toork cha-yu ha-ree-ka-dur. She-ker-lee mee ee-cher-seen?
lines.english: Turkish tea is wonderful. Do you drink it with sugar?
lines.correction_hint: Şeker (sugar) starts with 'sh'. Say: she-ker-SEEZ.

lines.speaker: app
lines.turkish: Doğru seçim, daha sağlıklı. Bugün ne yapacaksın?
lines.slow_phonetic: Do-roo se-cheem, da-ha sa-luk-lu. Boo-goon ne ya-pa-jak-sun?
lines.english: Right choice, healthier. What will you do today?
lines.user_prompt: Say: I will go to work.
lines.correction_hint: ‘ğ’ is silent, it elongates the vowel. Say: ee-SHE gee-de-JE-eem.

lines.speaker: app
lines.english: May it be easy! Is your job difficult?
lines.correction_hint: Stress the second syllable. Say: bee-RAZ zor.

lines.speaker: app
lines.turkish: Anlıyorum ama sen iyi bir mühendissin. Başarılar dilerim!
lines.slow_phonetic: An-lu-yo-room a-ma sen ee-yee beer mu-hen-dees-seen. Ba-sha-ru-lar dee-le-reem!
lines.english: I understand but you are a good engineer. I wish you success!
lines.correction_hint: The 'ü' is like 'u' in 'pure'. Say: te-SHEK-kur e-de-REEM.

lines.speaker: app
lines.turkish: Rica ederim. Boş zamanlarında ne yaparsın?
lines.slow_phonetic: Ree-ja e-de-reem. Bosh za-man-la-run-da ne ya-par-sun?
lines.english: You're welcome. What do you do in your free time?
lines.correction_hint: Say it smoothly: kee-TAP o-koo-YO-room.

lines.speaker: app
lines.turkish: Kitap okumak güzeldir. Hangi dilde okuyorsun?
lines.slow_phonetic: Kee-tap o-koo-mak gu-zel-deer. Han-gee deel-de o-koo-yor-soon?
lines.english: Reading books is nice. In which language do you read?
lines.correction_hint: 'c' is 'j'. Say: een-gee-LEEZ-je.

lines.speaker: app
lines.english: Wonderful. Will you read in Turkish too?
lines.correction_hint: 'ı' is a neutral vowel. Say: ya-KUN-da.

lines.speaker: app
lines.turkish: Çok iyi. Türkçe zor mu sence?
lines.slow_phonetic: Chok ee-yee. Toork-che zor moo sen-je?
lines.english: Very good. Is Turkish difficult in your opinion?
lines.user_prompt: Say: It is a bit difficult but fun.
lines.correction_hint: 'ğ' is silent. Say: ey-len-JE-lee.

lines.speaker: app
lines.turkish: Katılıyorum! Zamanla öğreneceksin. Şimdi gitmem lazım.
lines.slow_phonetic: Ka-tu-lu-yo-room! Za-man-la uy-re-ne-jek-seen. Sheem-dee geet-mem la-zum.
lines.english: I agree! You will learn over time. Now I must go.
lines.correction_hint: 'ş' is 'sh'. Say: gu-ru-SHU-ruz.

lines.speaker: app
lines.english: See you! Take care of yourself.
lines.correction_hint: ‘ş’ is ‘sh’. Say: HOSH-cha kal.

lines.slow_phonetic: Ka-tu-lu-yo-room! Za-man-la uy-re-ne-jek-seen. Sheem-dee geet-mem la-zum.

lines.correction_hint: 'ş' is 'sh'. Say: gu-ru-SHU-ruz.

lines.speaker: app
lines.english: See you! Take care of yourself.
lines.correction_hint: ‘ş’ is ‘sh’. Say: HOSH-cha kal.

lines.speaker: app
lines.english: Hello again! How are you today?
lines.user_prompt: Say: I am very well, thanks.
lines.correction_hint: Say 'çok' with a 'ch' sound. EE-yee-yeem.

lines.speaker: app
lines.turkish: Bir plan yapalım. Bugün günlerden ne?
lines.slow_phonetic: Beer plan ya-pa-lım. Boo-goon goon-ler-den ne?
lines.english: Let's make a plan. What day is it today?
lines.correction_hint: 'ü' needs rounded lips. Boo-GOON Pa-ZAR-te-see.

lines.speaker: app
lines.english: Okay. Are you free on Wednesday?
lines.user_prompt: Say: Yes, I am free on Wednesday.
lines.correction_hint: Lots of 'sh' and 'ch' sounds. Char-SHAM-ba goo-noo bo-SHOOM.

lines.speaker: app
lines.turkish: Bir kafede buluşalım. Kahve ister misin?
lines.slow_phonetic: Beer ka-fe-de boo-loo-sha-lım. Kah-ve ees-ter mee-seen?
lines.english: Let's meet at a cafe. Do you want coffee?
lines.correction_hint: Use a clear English 'v', not 'w'. Kah-VE.

lines.speaker: app
lines.english: What time shall we meet?
lines.user_prompt: Say: Let's meet at two o'clock.
lines.correction_hint: Double 'a' in saat means hold it slightly longer. Sa-AT ee-kee-DE.

lines.speaker: app
lines.turkish: Saat iki çok mu erken? Üç nasıl?
lines.slow_phonetic: Sa-at ee-kee chok moo er-ken? Ooch na-sıl?
lines.english: Is two o'clock too early? What about three?
lines.user_prompt: Say: Okay, three o'clock is good.
lines.correction_hint: Tightly rounded lips for 'üç'. OOCH ooy-GOON.

lines.speaker: app
lines.english: Perfect. How many people are we?
lines.correction_hint: Pronounce 'ş' as 'sh'. Beez ee-KEE kee-shee-YEEZ.

lines.speaker: app
lines.english: Can you count to ten?
lines.correction_hint: For 'ö' round your lips and say 'e'. DÖRT.

lines.speaker: app
lines.english: Very good! And the rest?
lines.correction_hint: Keep 'ş' as 'sh' and 'ı' as neutral 'uh'. BESH, al-TUH, ye-DEE, se-KEEZ.

lines.speaker: app
lines.english: And the last two numbers?
lines.correction_hint: Use a deep 'oo' sound for 'u'. Do-KOOZ, on.

lines.speaker: app
lines.english: Excellent! Let's practice more numbers.
lines.correction_hint: Use 'ch' and 'sh' sounds. cha-lı-SHA-lım.

lines.speaker: app
lines.english: What is after ten?
lines.correction_hint: Clearly separate the words. On BEER, on ee-KEE.

lines.speaker: app
lines.turkish: Evet. Sonra on üç, on dört, on beş.
lines.slow_phonetic: E-vet. Son-ra on ooch, on dort, on besh.
lines.english: Yes. Then thirteen, fourteen, fifteen.
lines.correction_hint: Watch the 'ı' in altı. On al-TUH, on ye-DEE.

lines.speaker: app
lines.turkish: Ve son olarak on sekiz, on dokuz, yirmi.
lines.slow_phonetic: Ve son o-la-rak on se-keez, on do-kooz, yeer-mee.
lines.english: And finally eighteen, nineteen, twenty.
lines.correction_hint: Make sure 'saydım' uses the neutral 'ı'. Say-DUM.

lines.speaker: app
lines.turkish: Harika iş! Haftanın günlerini hatırlıyor musun?
lines.slow_phonetic: Ha-ree-ka eesh! Haf-ta-nın goon-le-ree-nee ha-tır-lı-yor moo-soon?
lines.english: Great job! Do you remember the days of the week?
lines.correction_hint: 'Salı' ends with the neutral 'ı'. Sa-LUH.

lines.speaker: app
lines.english: What comes after Wednesday?
lines.correction_hint: 'C' sounds like 'j' in jump. Joo-MA.

lines.speaker: app
lines.english: And the weekend?
lines.correction_hint: Remember the 'j' sound again. Joo-MAR-te-see.

lines.speaker: app
lines.english: Well done. Our meeting is on Wednesday.
lines.correction_hint: Crisp 'v' sound. E-vet, ka-fe-DE.

lines.speaker: app
lines.english: Which cafe do you prefer?
lines.user_prompt: Say: The cafe in the center.
lines.correction_hint: Stress the ending smoothly. Mer-kez-de-KEE ka-fe-YEE.

lines.speaker: app
lines.english: I know that place. It opens at eight.
lines.user_prompt: Say: Good, see you at three.
lines.correction_hint: Round lips for 'ü' and 'ö'. Gu-ZEL, sa-AT ooch-TE gu-ru-SHU-ruz.

lines.speaker: app
lines.turkish: Dur, ondan önce marketten bir şeye ihtiyacın var mı?
lines.slow_phonetic: Door, on-dan on-je mar-ket-ten beer she-ye eeh-tee-ya-jın var mı?
lines.english: Wait, do you need anything from the market before that?
lines.correction_hint: Crisp 'h' on Hayır, and 'sh' for teşekkür. HA-yur, te-shek-KUR e-de-REEM.

lines.speaker: app
lines.turkish: Peki, Çarşamba gününe kadar ne yapacaksın?
lines.slow_phonetic: Pe-kee, Char-sham-ba goo-noo-ne ka-dar ne ya-pa-jak-sın?
lines.english: Alright, what will you do until Wednesday?
lines.user_prompt: Say: I will work and rest.
lines.correction_hint: The 'ğ' is silent and just elongates the vowel. Cha-lı-sha-JA-um ve deen-le-ne-JE-eem.

lines.speaker: app
lines.english: Resting is important. Do you sleep early?
lines.correction_hint: Stress 'birde' and smoothly say 'uyurum'. Sa-AT on beer-DE oo-YOO-room.

lines.speaker: app
lines.english: That is a good time.
lines.correction_hint: Use the neutral 'ı' correctly. Ka-tuh-LUH-yo-room.

lines.speaker: app
lines.english: I have to go now. Have a nice day!
lines.correction_hint: Round lips for 'ü'. EE-yee goon-LER!

lines.slow_phonetic: Toork cha-yu ha-ree-ka-dur. She-ker-lee mee ee-cher-seen?
lines.english: Turkish tea is wonderful. Do you drink it with sugar?
lines.correction_hint: Şeker (sugar) starts with 'sh'. Say: she-ker-SEEZ.

lines.speaker: app
lines.turkish: Doğru seçim, daha sağlıklı. Bugün ne yapacaksın?
lines.slow_phonetic: Do-roo se-cheem, da-ha sa-luk-lu. Boo-goon ne ya-pa-jak-sun?
lines.english: Right choice, healthier. What will you do today?
lines.user_prompt: Say: I will go to work.
lines.correction_hint: ‘ğ’ is silent, it elongates the vowel. Say: ee-SHE gee-de-JE-eem.

lines.speaker: app
lines.english: May it be easy! Is your job difficult?
lines.correction_hint: Stress the second syllable. Say: bee-RAZ zor.

lines.speaker: app
lines.turkish: Anlıyorum ama sen iyi bir mühendissin. Başarılar dilerim!
lines.slow_phonetic: An-lu-yo-room a-ma sen ee-yee beer mu-hen-dees-seen. Ba-sha-ru-lar dee-le-reem!
lines.english: I understand but you are a good engineer. I wish you success!
lines.correction_hint: The 'ü' is like 'u' in 'pure'. Say: te-SHEK-kur e-de-REEM.

lines.speaker: app
lines.turkish: Rica ederim. Boş zamanlarında ne yaparsın?
lines.slow_phonetic: Ree-ja e-de-reem. Bosh za-man-la-run-da ne ya-par-sun?
lines.english: You're welcome. What do you do in your free time?
lines.correction_hint: Say it smoothly: kee-TAP o-koo-YO-room.

lines.speaker: app
lines.turkish: Kitap okumak güzeldir. Hangi dilde okuyorsun?
lines.slow_phonetic: Kee-tap o-koo-mak gu-zel-deer. Han-gee deel-de o-koo-yor-soon?
lines.english: Reading books is nice. In which language do you read?
lines.correction_hint: 'c' is 'j'. Say: een-gee-LEEZ-je.

lines.speaker: app
lines.english: Wonderful. Will you read in Turkish too?
lines.correction_hint: 'ı' is a neutral vowel. Say: ya-KUN-da.

lines.speaker: app
lines.turkish: Çok iyi. Türkçe zor mu sence?
lines.slow_phonetic: Chok ee-yee. Toork-che zor moo sen-je?
lines.english: Very good. Is Turkish difficult in your opinion?
lines.user_prompt: Say: It is a bit difficult but fun.
lines.correction_hint: 'ğ' is silent. Say: ey-len-JE-lee.

lines.speaker: app
lines.turkish: Katılıyorum! Zamanla öğreneceksin. Şimdi gitmem lazım.
lines.slow_phonetic: Ka-tu-lu-yo-room! Za-man-la uy-re-ne-jek-seen. Sheem-dee geet-mem la-zum.
lines.english: I agree! You will learn over time. Now I must go.
lines.correction_hint: 'ş' is 'sh'. Say: gu-ru-SHU-ruz.

lines.speaker: app
lines.english: See you! Take care of yourself.
lines.correction_hint: ‘ş’ is ‘sh’. Say: HOSH-cha kal.

lines.speaker: app
lines.english: Hello again! How are you today?
lines.user_prompt: Say: I am very well, thanks.
lines.correction_hint: Say 'çok' with a 'ch' sound. EE-yee-yeem.

lines.speaker: app
lines.turkish: Bir plan yapalım. Bugün günlerden ne?
lines.slow_phonetic: Beer plan ya-pa-lım. Boo-goon goon-ler-den ne?
lines.english: Let's make a plan. What day is it today?
lines.correction_hint: 'ü' needs rounded lips. Boo-GOON Pa-ZAR-te-see.

lines.speaker: app
lines.english: Okay. Are you free on Wednesday?
lines.user_prompt: Say: Yes, I am free on Wednesday.
lines.correction_hint: Lots of 'sh' and 'ch' sounds. Char-SHAM-ba goo-noo bo-SHOOM.

lines.speaker: app
lines.turkish: Bir kafede buluşalım. Kahve ister misin?
lines.slow_phonetic: Beer ka-fe-de boo-loo-sha-lım. Kah-ve ees-ter mee-seen?
lines.english: Let's meet at a cafe. Do you want coffee?
lines.correction_hint: Use a clear English 'v', not 'w'. Kah-VE.

lines.speaker: app
lines.english: What time shall we meet?
lines.user_prompt: Say: Let's meet at two o'clock.
lines.correction_hint: Double 'a' in saat means hold it slightly longer. Sa-AT ee-kee-DE.

lines.speaker: app
lines.turkish: Saat iki çok mu erken? Üç nasıl?
lines.slow_phonetic: Sa-at ee-kee chok moo er-ken? Ooch na-sıl?
lines.english: Is two o'clock too early? What about three?
lines.user_prompt: Say: Okay, three o'clock is good.
lines.correction_hint: Tightly rounded lips for 'üç'. OOCH ooy-GOON.

lines.speaker: app
lines.english: Perfect. How many people are we?
lines.correction_hint: Pronounce 'ş' as 'sh'. Beez ee-KEE kee-shee-YEEZ.

lines.speaker: app
lines.english: Can you count to ten?
lines.correction_hint: For 'ö' round your lips and say 'e'. DÖRT.

lines.speaker: app
lines.english: Very good! And the rest?
lines.correction_hint: Keep 'ş' as 'sh' and 'ı' as neutral 'uh'. BESH, al-TUH, ye-DEE, se-KEEZ.

lines.speaker: app
lines.english: And the last two numbers?
lines.correction_hint: Use a deep 'oo' sound for 'u'. Do-KOOZ, on.

lines.speaker: app
lines.english: Excellent! Let's practice more numbers.
lines.correction_hint: Use 'ch' and 'sh' sounds. cha-lı-SHA-lım.

lines.speaker: app
lines.english: What is after ten?
lines.correction_hint: Clearly separate the words. On BEER, on ee-KEE.

lines.speaker: app
lines.turkish: Evet. Sonra on üç, on dört, on beş.
lines.slow_phonetic: E-vet. Son-ra on ooch, on dort, on besh.
lines.english: Yes. Then thirteen, fourteen, fifteen.
lines.correction_hint: Watch the 'ı' in altı. On al-TUH, on ye-DEE.

lines.speaker: app
lines.turkish: Ve son olarak on sekiz, on dokuz, yirmi.
lines.slow_phonetic: Ve son o-la-rak on se-keez, on do-kooz, yeer-mee.
lines.english: And finally eighteen, nineteen, twenty.
lines.correction_hint: Make sure 'saydım' uses the neutral 'ı'. Say-DUM.

lines.speaker: app
lines.turkish: Harika iş! Haftanın günlerini hatırlıyor musun?
lines.slow_phonetic: Ha-ree-ka eesh! Haf-ta-nın goon-le-ree-nee ha-tır-lı-yor moo-soon?
lines.english: Great job! Do you remember the days of the week?
lines.correction_hint: 'Salı' ends with the neutral 'ı'. Sa-LUH.

lines.speaker: app
lines.english: What comes after Wednesday?
lines.correction_hint: 'C' sounds like 'j' in jump. Joo-MA.

lines.speaker: app
lines.english: And the weekend?
lines.correction_hint: Remember the 'j' sound again. Joo-MAR-te-see.

lines.speaker: app
lines.english: Well done. Our meeting is on Wednesday.
lines.correction_hint: Crisp 'v' sound. E-vet, ka-fe-DE.

lines.speaker: app
lines.english: Which cafe do you prefer?
lines.user_prompt: Say: The cafe in the center.
lines.correction_hint: Stress the ending smoothly. Mer-kez-de-KEE ka-fe-YEE.

lines.speaker: app
lines.english: I know that place. It opens at eight.
lines.user_prompt: Say: Good, see you at three.
lines.correction_hint: Round lips for 'ü' and 'ö'. Gu-ZEL, sa-AT ooch-TE gu-ru-SHU-ruz.

lines.speaker: app
lines.turkish: Dur, ondan önce marketten bir şeye ihtiyacın var mı?
lines.slow_phonetic: Door, on-dan on-je mar-ket-ten beer she-ye eeh-tee-ya-jın var mı?
lines.english: Wait, do you need anything from the market before that?
lines.correction_hint: Crisp 'h' on Hayır, and 'sh' for teşekkür. HA-yur, te-shek-KUR e-de-REEM.

lines.speaker: app
lines.turkish: Peki, Çarşamba gününe kadar ne yapacaksın?
lines.slow_phonetic: Pe-kee, Char-sham-ba goo-noo-ne ka-dar ne ya-pa-jak-sın?
lines.english: Alright, what will you do until Wednesday?
lines.user_prompt: Say: I will work and rest.
lines.correction_hint: The 'ğ' is silent and just elongates the vowel. Cha-lı-sha-JA-um ve deen-le-ne-JE-eem.

lines.speaker: app
lines.english: Resting is important. Do you sleep early?
lines.correction_hint: Stress 'birde' and smoothly say 'uyurum'. Sa-AT on beer-DE oo-YOO-room.

lines.speaker: app
lines.english: That is a good time.
lines.correction_hint: Use the neutral 'ı' correctly. Ka-tuh-LUH-yo-room.

lines.speaker: app
lines.english: I have to go now. Have a nice day!
lines.correction_hint: Round lips for 'ü'. EE-yee goon-LER!

lines.speaker: app
lines.turkish: Merhaba tekrar! Bugün Çarşamba. Hazır mısın?
lines.slow_phonetic: Mer-ha-ba tek-rar! Boo-goon Char-sham-ba. Ha-zır mı-sın?
lines.english: Hello again! Today is Wednesday. Are you ready?
lines.user_prompt: Say: Yes, I am absolutely ready.
lines.correction_hint: Keep 'ı' neutral in hazırım. ke-seen-LEEK-le ha-ZU-rum.

lines.speaker: app
lines.turkish: Harika. Kafeye doğru yoldayım. Sen neredesin?
lines.slow_phonetic: Ha-ree-ka. Ka-fe-ye do-ru yol-da-yım. Sen ne-re-de-seen?
lines.english: Great. I am on my way to the cafe. Where are you?
lines.user_prompt: Say: I am walking on the road right now.
lines.correction_hint: Round lips tightly for 'ü'. yue-rue-YO-room.

lines.speaker: app
lines.english: Do you know the way to the cafe?
lines.correction_hint: Make sure 'lazım' has a long 'a' and neutral 'ı'. la-ZUM.

lines.speaker: app
lines.english: No problem. Go straight from the park.
lines.user_prompt: Say: Okay, I am going straight from the park.
lines.correction_hint: Use the rounded 'ü' for düz. dooz gee-DEE-yo-room.

lines.speaker: app
lines.english: Then turn right at the traffic lights.
lines.user_prompt: Say: I am turning right at the traffic lights.
lines.correction_hint: The 'ğ' is silent, just say 'saa'. ı-şık-la-rın-da sa-a dö-nü-yo-rum.

lines.speaker: app
lines.english: Yes. The cafe is on your left.
lines.user_prompt: Say: Yes, I see the cafe right in front of me now.
lines.expected_response: Evet, şimdi kafeyi tam karşımda görüyorum
lines.correction_hint: 'ş' is 'sh'. sheem-DEE ka-fe-YEE tam kar-shım-DA go-rue-YO-room.

lines.speaker: user
lines.expected_response: Evet, şimdi kafeyi tam karşımda görüyorum

lines.speaker: app
lines.english: I am inside. I have a menu.
lines.user_prompt: Say: Okay, I am coming inside now too.
lines.expected_response: Tamam, ben de şimdi içeri giriyorum
lines.correction_hint: 'ç' is 'ch'. sheem-DEE ee-che-REE gee-REE-yo-room.

lines.speaker: user
lines.expected_response: Tamam, ben de şimdi içeri giriyorum

lines.speaker: app
lines.turkish: Hoş geldin! Buraya otur. Ne içmek istersin?
lines.slow_phonetic: Hosh gel-deen! Boo-ra-ya o-toor. Ne eech-mek ees-ter-seen?
lines.english: Welcome! Sit here. What would you like to drink?
lines.user_prompt: Say: I am requesting a hot tea.
lines.expected_response: Ben sıcak bir çay rica ediyorum
lines.correction_hint: 'c' is 'j', 'ç' is 'ch'. su-JAK beer CHAY ree-JA e-dee-yo-room.

lines.speaker: user
lines.expected_response: Ben sıcak bir çay rica ediyorum

lines.speaker: app
lines.english: Just tea? Are you hungry?
lines.user_prompt: Say: Yes, I am really very hungry today.
lines.correction_hint: ger-CHEK-ten chok A-chım.

lines.speaker: app
lines.english: Waiter, can we order?
lines.user_prompt: Say: What exactly is on the menu today?
lines.expected_response: Bugün menüde tam olarak ne var?
lines.correction_hint: Stress clearly: boo-GOON me-nue-DE tam o-la-rak ne var?

lines.speaker: user
lines.expected_response: Bugün menüde tam olarak ne var?

lines.speaker: app
lines.turkish: Tavuk, mercimek çorbası ve salata var.
lines.slow_phonetic: Ta-vook, mer-jee-mek chor-ba-sı ve sa-la-ta var.
lines.english: There is chicken, lentil soup, and salad.
lines.user_prompt: Say: I want a lentil soup.
lines.correction_hint: Use 'j' for 'c' and 'ch' for 'ç'. mer-jee-MEK chor-ba-SUH.

lines.speaker: app
lines.english: Good choice. I will eat chicken.
lines.user_prompt: Say: I wonder, how much is the lentil soup?
lines.correction_hint: 'c' is 'j'. a-ja-BA.

lines.speaker: app
lines.english: The soup is only fifty liras.
lines.user_prompt: Say: This price is really not very expensive.
lines.expected_response: Bu fiyat gerçekten çok pahalı değil
lines.correction_hint: The 'ğ' is silent in değil, it sounds like 'de-yeel'. pa-ha-LUH de-YEEL.

lines.speaker: user
lines.expected_response: Bu fiyat gerçekten çok pahalı değil

lines.speaker: app
lines.turkish: Hayır, ucuz. Yemekler geldi. Afiyet olsun!
lines.slow_phonetic: Ha-yır, oo-jooz. Ye-mek-ler gel-dee. A-fee-yet ol-soon!
lines.english: No, it is cheap. The food is here. Enjoy!
lines.user_prompt: Say: Thanks a lot, enjoy your meal too.
lines.expected_response: Çok teşekkürler, sana da afiyet olsun
lines.correction_hint: chok te-shek-kür-LER, sa-na da a-fee-yet ol-soon.

lines.speaker: user
lines.expected_response: Çok teşekkürler, sana da afiyet olsun

lines.speaker: app
lines.english: The meal was delicious. Let's pay the bill.
lines.user_prompt: Say: Please let me pay the bill today.
lines.correction_hint: Neutral 'ı' in hesabı. he-sa-BUH luet-FEN ben oe-de-ye-yeem.

lines.speaker: app
lines.english: Are you sure? Thank you very much.
lines.user_prompt: Say: You're welcome. Shall we go shopping now?
lines.expected_response: Rica ederim. Şimdi alışverişe gidelim mi?
lines.correction_hint: ree-JA e-de-reem. sheem-DEE a-lısh-ve-ree-SHE gee-de-LEEM mee?

lines.speaker: user
lines.expected_response: Rica ederim. Şimdi alışverişe gidelim mi?

lines.speaker: app
lines.turkish: Markete gidelim. Gömleğe ihtiyacın var mı?
lines.slow_phonetic: Mar-ke-te gee-de-leem. Gom-le-e eeh-tee-ya-jın var mı?
lines.english: Let's go to the market. Do you need a shirt?
lines.user_prompt: Say: Yes, I want a new blue shirt.
lines.expected_response: Evet, yeni mavi bir gömlek istiyorum
lines.correction_hint: Round your lips for 'ö'. goem-LEK.

lines.speaker: user
lines.expected_response: Evet, yeni mavi bir gömlek istiyorum

lines.speaker: app
lines.turkish: Şu mavi gömleğe bak. Dene istersen.
lines.slow_phonetic: Shoo ma-vee gom-le-e bak. De-ne ees-ter-sen.
lines.english: Look at that blue shirt. Try it on if you want.
lines.user_prompt: Say: This shirt fits me perfectly.
lines.expected_response: Bu gömlek tam üzerime göre oldu
lines.correction_hint: Round lips for 'ü' and 'ö'. ue-ze-ree-ME goe-RE ol-DOO.

lines.speaker: user
lines.expected_response: Bu gömlek tam üzerime göre oldu

lines.speaker: app
lines.turkish: Fiyatını soralım. Afedersiniz, bu ne kadar?
lines.slow_phonetic: Fee-ya-tı-nı so-ra-lım. A-fe-der-see-neez, boo ne ka-dar?
lines.english: Let's ask the price. Excuse me, how much is this?
lines.user_prompt: Say: The seller says it is five hundred liras.
lines.expected_response: Satıcı beş yüz lira olduğunu söylüyor
lines.correction_hint: sa-tuh-JUH besh YUEZ lee-RA ol-doo-u-noo soey-lue-YOR.

lines.speaker: user
lines.expected_response: Satıcı beş yüz lira olduğunu söylüyor

lines.speaker: app
lines.turkish: Bu biraz pahalı. İndirim yapabilir misiniz?
lines.slow_phonetic: Boo bee-raz pa-ha-lı. Een-dee-reem ya-pa-bee-leer mee-see-neez?
lines.english: This is a bit expensive. Can you give a discount?
lines.user_prompt: Say: Please make the price four hundred liras.
lines.expected_response: Lütfen fiyatı dört yüz lira yapın
lines.correction_hint: luet-FEN fee-ya-TUH doert YUEZ lee-RA ya-PUN.

lines.speaker: user
lines.expected_response: Lütfen fiyatı dört yüz lira yapın

lines.speaker: app
lines.turkish: Satıcı kabul etti! Pazarlıkta çok iyisin.
lines.slow_phonetic: Sa-tı-jı ka-bool et-tee! Pa-zar-lık-ta chok ee-yee-seen.
lines.english: The seller agreed! You are very good at bargaining.
lines.user_prompt: Say: Yes, I think this is a very good price.
lines.expected_response: Evet, bence bu çok iyi bir fiyat
lines.correction_hint: 'c' is 'j'. ben-JE boo chok ee-YEE beer fee-YAT.

lines.speaker: user
lines.expected_response: Evet, bence bu çok iyi bir fiyat

lines.speaker: app
lines.turkish: İşte poşetin. Başka bir şeye ihtiyacımız var mı?
lines.slow_phonetic: Eesh-te po-she-teen. Bash-ka beer she-ye eeh-tee-ya-jı-mız var mı?
lines.english: Here is your bag. Do we need anything else?
lines.user_prompt: Say: Maybe we can buy some fresh apples too.
lines.expected_response: Belki biraz da taze elma alabiliriz
lines.correction_hint: ta-ZE el-MA a-la-bee-lee-REEZ.

lines.speaker: user
lines.expected_response: Belki biraz da taze elma alabiliriz

lines.speaker: app
lines.english: The greengrocer is right across the street.
lines.user_prompt: Say: Okay, let's carefully cross the street.
lines.correction_hint: deek-kat-LEE-je jad-de-DEN kar-shu-YA ge-che-LEEM.

lines.speaker: app
lines.turkish: Dikkatli ol, sola ve sağa bak.
lines.slow_phonetic: Deek-kat-lee ol, so-la ve sa-a bak.
lines.english: Be careful, look left and right.
lines.user_prompt: Say: The road seems completely empty right now.
lines.expected_response: Şu anda yol tamamen boş görünüyor
lines.correction_hint: shoo an-DA yol ta-MA-men bosh goe-rue-nue-YOR.

lines.speaker: user
lines.expected_response: Şu anda yol tamamen boş görünüyor

lines.speaker: app
lines.english: Let's buy two kilos of red apples.
lines.user_prompt: Say: These red apples look very fresh.
lines.expected_response: Bu kırmızı elmalar çok taze görünüyor
lines.correction_hint: Use neutral 'ı' deeply. kur-mu-ZUH el-ma-LAR chok ta-ZE goe-rue-nue-YOR.

lines.speaker: user
lines.expected_response: Bu kırmızı elmalar çok taze görünüyor

lines.speaker: app
lines.turkish: Evet. Elmalar için elli lira burada.
lines.slow_phonetic: E-vet. El-ma-lar ee-cheen el-lee lee-ra boo-ra-da.
lines.english: Yes. Here is fifty liras for the apples.
lines.user_prompt: Say: Thanks a lot, we bought everything today.
lines.expected_response: Çok teşekkürler, bugün her şeyi aldık
lines.correction_hint: chok te-shek-kür-LER, boo-GOON her she-YEE al-DUK.

lines.speaker: user
lines.expected_response: Çok teşekkürler, bugün her şeyi aldık

lines.speaker: app
lines.english: I am tired now. I will go home.
lines.user_prompt: Say: I am tired too. It was a very beautiful day.
lines.expected_response: Ben de yoruldum. Çok güzel bir gündü
lines.correction_hint: ben de yo-rool-DOOM. chok gue-ZEL beer guen-DUE.

lines.speaker: user
lines.expected_response: Ben de yoruldum. Çok güzel bir gündü

lines.speaker: app
lines.english: See you tomorrow! Take care of yourself.
lines.user_prompt: Say: See you! Hope to meet again tomorrow, goodbye.
lines.expected_response: Görüşürüz! Yarın tekrar buluşmak üzere, hoşça kal
lines.correction_hint: goe-rue-shue-RUEZ! ya-RUN tek-RAR boo-loosh-MAK ue-ze-re, hosh-CHA kal.

lines.speaker: user
lines.expected_response: Görüşürüz! Yarın tekrar buluşmak üzere, hoşça kal
